calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Oct-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. VINCENT D. SLAVENS OF KRAUSE KALFAYAN BENINK & SLAVENS, LLP, TEL. NO. (619) 232-0331 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. TARA M. STEELEY, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4655 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS
Sustained with leave to amend. AMENDED PETITION TO BE FILED BY OCTOBER 22, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: La Vena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/HK
